titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Social Science Data Archive, Yale University, Records
Social Science Data Archive, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday January 23, 2020 at 11:37
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Social Science Data Archive, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of annual reports and general administrative records of the Social Science Data Archive (administered by the Yale Social Science Library) and acquisition records of the Roper Center for Public Opinion Research.

corpname.part: Yale University. Social Science Data Archive
Yale University. Social Science Libraries and Information Services

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-D (YRG 32-D), Records of Yale school and departmental libraries and collections.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Social Science Library, 2006.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Social Science Data Archive, Yale University, Records (RU 1008). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of annual reports and general administrative records of the Social Science Data Archive (administered by the Yale Social Science Library) and acquisition records of the Roper Center for Public Opinion Research.

corpname.part: Roper Center for Public Opinion Research
Yale University. Social Science Data Archive

did.unittitle: Administrative records of the Social Science Data Archive (SSDA)and acquisition records of the Roper Center for Public Opinion Collection
SSDA National Center for Health Statistics Tapes
Inventory of paper Roper questionnaires at SSL
Roper Tapes at Yale - with archive numbers
Roper listing of Yale data by DSN
Correspondence related to migration of SSDA from Yale VM to statlab server
Roper Center for Public Opinion Research
United States Information Agency Data Set Listing
United States Information Agency Report and Data Listing, 2 Volumes
The Roper Center American Collection Volume 5
The Roper Center American Collections Volume IV
Profiles of the Major American Collections Volume VI
